profiles.bio: The VICE PRESIDENT of Malhaar A passionate musician, creative strategist, and student leader, Anand Singh currently serves as the Vice President of MALHAAR – The Music Society of Motilal Nehru College. With a strong foundation in Indian classical music and a deep appreciation for artistic collaboration, he believes that music is not just a performance but a way of building communities and inspiring people.

profiles.bio: My musical journey started in college. Before that, I wasn’t very interested in music, but seeing so many talented people around me sparked my curiosity. After coming back home, I gradually developed a deep interest in classical music. Then one day, while I was jogging in a garden, I heard an elderly man playing the flute. That beautiful sound left a lasting impression on me and inspired me to explore the instrument. Since then, I’ve been passionate about both Indian classical music and the flute, and I’ve been enjoying the journey of learning and growing ever since

events.name: AAROHI'26 DAY 1
events.description: AAROHI is an inter-college Indian and Western music competition that celebrates the spirit of music, creativity, and artistic excellence. It serves as a platform for talented musicians and performers to showcase their skills, exchange ideas, and foster cultural appreciation through diverse musical expressions. Bringing together artists from different backgrounds, AAROHI promotes collaboration, healthy competition, and a shared passion for music, making it a vibrant celebration of rhythm, melody, and harmony.

achievements.title: Ujval Udaykumar
achievements.description: Ujval Udaya Kumar from Malhaar received first position in Anaahat (solo instrumental) competition held by Deen Dayal Upadhyay college on 1st march 2026

merchandise.description: This Malhaar merchandise reflects the society's passion for music and artistic expression. Featuring a clean front logo and a detailed Greek-inspired harpist artwork on the back, the design blends elegance with creativity. Personalized with each member's name and post, the merch serves as a symbol of identity, unity, and pride for every member of the Malhaar family.

The Malhaar Official Merchandise is more than just a T-shirt it is a symbol of identity, creativity, and belonging for every member of the Music Society of Motilal Nehru College. Featuring a clean and elegant front design with the Malhaar logo and society name, the merch reflects the professionalism and pride of the society. The striking artwork on the back, showcasing headphones intertwined with musical elements, represents the power of music to connect, inspire, and create lasting memories. Personalized with each member's name and post, this merch celebrates individual contributions while reinforcing the collective spirit of the Malhaar family. Designed with a premium aesthetic and timeless appeal, it stands as a wearable representation of passion, harmony, and the musical legacy of MLNC.

site_content.content_value: To build an enduring, universally accessible sanctuary in our college where music knows no linguistic or generic borders; where a sitarist can construct ambient soundscapes with a synth programmer, creating novel musical expressions that spark inspiration globally.

Equip students with professional instrument sets, persistent performance tracking metrics, masterclass workshops, and structured weekly practice times to foster consistent craft growth while sharing music publicly with the local community.

Malhaar is the premier collegiate music club, serving as a creative catalyst where traditional Indian Classical lineages and diverse Global Western disciplines seamlessly unite. We are singers, guitarists, computer producers, sitar players, and rhythmists collaborating to push sonic horizons. With fully equipped rehearsal spaces, student performance records, community jams, and prestigious choir competitions, Malhaar is a vibrant sanctuary to live, breathe, and shape the sound of tomorrow.

This application is built with a bespoke React & TypeScript frontend, powered by an Express API backend and JSON file based persistent database. Designed with generous ambient spacing, dynamic svara animation engines, a comprehensive live syncing administrative panel, and custom tailored leaderboards for the Malhaar Music Society.

Joining Malhaar gives you the ultimate platform to cultivate your musical talent, collaborate across classical & modern genres, perform in grand inter-college live festivals, track your session logs dynamically via the leaderboard, and become a part of a beautiful, lifelong family of performers.

Founded in 2010 with just a couple of classical vocalists on a dormitory veranda, Malhaar has scaled to over 150 active performers, hundreds of staged masterclasses, and an annually celebrated full-house auditorium recital. Across our journey, we have consistently secured gold medals in classical polyphony, crafted custom recording suites, and fostered an enduring culture of musical inclusivity.

alumni.bio:
Angaraag Mahanta, popularly known as Papon, is one of India's most celebrated singer-composers, renowned for his soulful voice and unique blend of Assamese folk, Indian classical, and contemporary music. He has mesmerised audiences with iconic songs such as Moh Moh Ke Dhaage, Jiyein Kyun, Kyon
, Humnava, Bulleya, and Khumaar. Before establishing himself as a prominent figure in the Indian music industry, Papon spent part of his college life at **Motilal Nehru College, University of Delhi**, where he pursued English Honours and fondly recalls spending his days with a guitar, creating memories that shaped his musical journey. Today, his music continues to touch millions, making him one of the most versatile and beloved voices in contemporary Indian music.
alumni.name: Papon
